description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma sandals are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. The sandals are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style. Upper Synthetic uppers with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle attached by a diagonal strap across the midfoot Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for a snug Fit Logo name on the ankle strap, cat logo on the midfoot diagonal strap Lightly cushioned lining for better comfort Pull loop in the collar Midsole Cushioned foam footbed with hexagonal pattern for all-day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with V-shaped multi-directional lugs for superior grip Wash care Rub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
